revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''7-4-225

Alternative term: Angle of shearing resistance

The limiting value of the angle between the reaction on a plane within a soil mass at which shearing may occur and the normal to that plane.


Note: The tangent of the angle of internal friction is the coefficient of friction for the soil.

{{IALAFooter}}
